fixes: Demo walkthrough tips now work in two-pane layout
Messages send from all your sender IDs, not just the first
Inbox editing feels instant instead of laggy
Spam and automated convos filtered out of inbox
features: Mail-style UI for easy sorting and viewing
Addition of X, LinkedIn, Telegram, Email, Slack, Instagram in additon to iMessage and Whatsapp
title: RPLY 2.0 & Connect (X, LinkedIn, Email, Instagram and more)
description: Messages unify across your 8 inboxes and 10x faster thanks to parallel fetching. We also rebuilt the sidebar with a cleaner Mail-style design for easy access.
